title: From The North
description: Cool christmas mod that adds food and decoration
body:
This Mod Is For The 2021 Winter Jam Mod Jam

This Mod Is  Also For The 2022 Winter Jam Mod Jam

This Mod works with jei

you're allowed to use this mod in your modpack!

This holiday mod adds

4 Pies

2 Sauces

4 Other Holiday Food Items

4 New Craft able Items

Counters

Presents

And A Very Festive Door

This mod adds lots of festive decorations and food so you should download :D
